title: Literary Feature Ontology (LFO) v0.1
description: Controlled vocabulary for Palimpsest annotation body types.

structural.dialogue.quote.label: Dialogue Quote
structural.dialogue.quote.description: A quoted speech span with optional speaker attribution.

entity.character.label: Character (Person)
entity.character.description: A named character or person entity.

entity.work.label: Literary Work
entity.work.description: A referenced literary or artistic work.

entity.coreference_link.label: Coreference Link
entity.coreference_link.description: A mention linked to an entity coreference chain.

signal.sentiment.label: Sentiment
signal.sentiment.description: Valence and arousal scores for a text span.

signal.lexical_density.label: Lexical Features
signal.lexical_density.description: TTR, hapax count, Yule's K, mean word length.

signal.syntactic_complexity.label: Syntactic Complexity
signal.syntactic_complexity.description: Dependency tree depth, subordination ratio, sentence length.

signal.topic_assignment.label: Topic Assignment
signal.topic_assignment.description: LDA topic distribution for a text segment.

signal.narrative_arc.label: Narrative Arc
signal.narrative_arc.description: Function-word arc dimensions: staging, progression, tension.

signal.self_similarity.label: Self-Similarity
signal.self_similarity.description: Passage-pair cosine similarity from paragraph embeddings.

signal.rqa.label: RQA Metrics
signal.rqa.description: Recurrence quantification analysis: RR, DET, LAM.

signal.narrative_alphabet.label: Narrative Alphabet
signal.narrative_alphabet.description: Discrete state label from K-means clustering of feature vectors.

signal.lithmm_state.label: LitHMM State
signal.lithmm_state.description: Passage state from multivariate Hidden Markov Model.

signal.compartment.label: Thematic Compartment
signal.compartment.description: A/B compartment from eigenvector decomposition of similarity matrix.

signal.domain_boundary.label: Domain Boundary
signal.domain_boundary.description: TAD-like domain from directionality index analysis.

structure.section_boundary.label: Section Boundary
structure.section_boundary.description: A section or chapter boundary extracted from document structure (EPUB headings, HTML headings).

structure.endnote.label: Endnote
structure.endnote.description: An endnote or footnote with bidirectional link between call-site in body text and note content.

structure.heading.label: Heading
structure.heading.description: A heading element extracted from document structure, with level (h1-h6) and text.
